LLM Wiki Research Outputs

External Dataset Sources

CALCE, RADAR4KIT, and NASA qualification provenance.

EverythingCALB (China Aviation Lithium Battery)External datasets
Dataset qualification only: these sources describe whether CALCE, RADAR4KIT, and NASA are usable next targets. They do not validate the frozen CALB rule.

CALCE, RADAR4KIT, And NASA Qualification Artifacts
